summary: Implemented the M7 terrain-route-node strategic map authority schema, deterministic query surfaces, content-runtime parsing, protocol query schemas, save/load strategic terrain hash compatibility, ADR implementation amendment, and focused deterministic/negative tests. District governance footprints remain overlay-only and cannot create reachability, route cost, hit-test priority, path preview, or AI reason authority.

tests_run.result: Working tree lists the expected task changes under allowed paths plus lead route/start messages already present in project/messages.
format:check, lint, workspace typecheck, and architecture:check passed; architecture self-test reported 15 expected violations.
Focused updated test files passed; 4 test files passed; 57 tests passed.

decisions.decision: Add StrategicTerrainDefinitionV1 as the M7 player-facing authority with TerrainPatch, BarrierChannel, StrategicNode, RouteCorridor, and DistrictGovernanceFootprint overlay records.

Keep district governance footprints as overlay-only explanation/consequence data; route reachability, route cost, hit testing, path preview, and AI reasons derive from nodes/corridors/barriers/terrain instead.

Runtime and save/load compatibility preserve and compare strategicTerrainHash; missing or mismatched terrain snapshots reject with structured semantic issues instead of falling back to topology, polygons, grids, or renderer lines.
Strategic route preview uses deterministic tie-break order: total travel cost, corridor count, corridor id sequence, endpoint node id sequence, then destination node id.

risks.summary: This task defines schema/query/save/content boundaries only; renderer interaction, fixture migration, validation report, and content lock remain out of scope for this handoff.
risks.mitigation: Route to qa_reviewer for schema review before downstream fixture, renderer, and validation tasks consume the read model.

risks.summary: Strategic terrain support extends already-large world-state, content-runtime, save-format, and protocol files.
risks.mitigation: Kept implementation explicit and milestone-scoped, avoided new manager abstractions, and covered deterministic/negative behavior with focused tests.

requested_action: Review the strategic terrain authority schema/query/save/content hash implementation and tests; either accept or request changes.
